# IAM API, gRPC: AuthenticationService.SelectChallenge

No description.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc SelectChallenge (SelectChallengeRequest) returns (Operation)
```

The method starts a long-running operation.

- Response type: `AuthenticationOperationResponse`
- Metadata type: `AuthenticationOperationMetadata`

## SelectChallengeRequest

```json
{
  "authentication_id": "string",
  "challenge_id": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| authentication_id | string | No description. |
| challenge_id | string | No description. |

## google.longrunning.Operation

Long-running operation returned by asynchronous API methods.

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "done": true,
  "error": {},
  "response": {}
}
```

| state | enum AuthenticationState | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_STARTING`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CHALLENGE_REQUIRED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CHALLENGE_SENT`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_VERIFYING`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_AUTHENTICATED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_FAILED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CANCELLED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_EXPIRED`. |
| state_reason | enum AuthenticationStateReason | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_START_ACCEPTED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_SUBJECT_RESOLVED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_SUBJECT_NOT_FOUND`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_RISK_ALLOWED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_RISK_CHALLENGE_REQUIRED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_RISK_BLOCKED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_SELECTED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_SENT`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_RESENT`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_RESPONSE_INVALID`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_USER_APPROVED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_USER_DENIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_REDIRECT_REQUIRED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_CALLBACK_RECEIVED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_CALLBACK_INVALID`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_WEBAUTHN_ASSERTION_INVALID`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_AUTHENTICATED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_EXPIRED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CANCELLED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_FAILED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_RESELECTED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_RESEND_NOT_AVAILABLE`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED`, `AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_NOT_ALLOWED`. |
| current_challenge | AuthenticationChallengeInfo | No description. |
| available_challenges[] | AuthenticationChallengeOption | No description. |
| error | AuthenticationError | No description. |
| result | AuthenticationResult | No description. |
| context | AuthenticationContext | No description. |
| create_time | Timestamp | No description. |
| update_time | Timestamp | No description. |
| expire_time | Timestamp | No description. |
| etag | string | No description. |
| requested_assurance_level | enum AuthenticationAssuranceLevel | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL0`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL1`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL2`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL3`. |
| version | int64 | No description. |

## AuthenticationSubject

AuthenticationSubject identifies the claimant at the start of authentication.

The caller must provide exactly one identifier. These values are request-only
inputs and must not be returned raw in public Authentication snapshots.

```json
{
  "user_id": "string",
  "email": "string",
  "phone": {
    "e164": "string"
  },
  "username": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| user_id | string | Stable user identifier. |
| email | string | Email address entered by the user. |
| phone | PhoneNumber | Phone number normalized as an international E.164 number. |
| username | string | Tenant-local username or login name. |

## AuthenticationPurpose

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_PRIMARY_LOGIN | 1 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_REAUTHENTICATION | 2 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_STEP_UP | 3 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_ACCOUNT_RECOVERY | 4 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_IDENTITY_LINKING | 5 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_PURPOSE_TRANSACTION_CONFIRMATION | 6 | No description. |

## AuthenticationState

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_STARTING | 1 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CHALLENGE_REQUIRED | 2 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CHALLENGE_SENT | 3 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_VERIFYING | 4 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_AUTHENTICATED | 5 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_FAILED | 6 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_CANCELLED | 7 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_EXPIRED | 8 | No description. |

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_START_ACCEPTED | 1 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_SUBJECT_RESOLVED | 2 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_SUBJECT_NOT_FOUND | 3 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_RISK_ALLOWED | 4 | No description. |

| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_RESENT | 9 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CHALLENGE_RESPONSE_INVALID | 10 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED | 11 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_USER_APPROVED | 12 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_USER_DENIED | 13 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_REDIRECT_REQUIRED | 14 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_CALLBACK_RECEIVED | 15 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_CALLBACK_INVALID | 16 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT | 17 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_WEBAUTHN_ASSERTION_INVALID | 18 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_AUTHENTICATED | 19 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_EXPIRED | 20 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_STATE_REASON_CANCELLED | 21 | No description. |

| id | string | No description. |
| kind | enum AuthenticationChallengeKind | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_PASSWORD_INPUT`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_OTP_INPUT`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_APPROVAL`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_REDIRECT`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_WEBAUTHN_ASSERTION`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_KIND_PROVIDER_CALLBACK`. |
| method | enum AuthenticationMethod | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_PASSWORD`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_SMS_OTP`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_EMAIL_OTP`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_TOTP`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_PUSH_APPROVAL`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_PUSH_OTP`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_SIM_PUSH`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_MOBILE_ID`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_WEBAUTHN_PASSKEY`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_OIDC`, `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD_SAML`. |
| method_id | string | No description. |
| provider_id | string | No description. |
| delivery_channel | enum AuthenticationDeliveryChannel | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_CLIENT`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SMS`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_EMAIL`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_AUTHENTICATOR_APP`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_PUSH`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SIM_PUSH`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_MOBILE_ID`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_WEBAUTHN`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_OIDC`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SAML`. |
| masked_destination | string | No description. |
| expire_time | Timestamp | No description. |
| resend_available_time | Timestamp | No description. |
| attempt_count | int32 | No description. |
| remaining_attempts | int32 | No description. |
| actions[] | enum AuthenticationChallengeAction | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_ACTION_SUBMIT`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_ACTION_RESEND`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_ACTION_CANCEL`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_ACTION_SELECT_ANOTHER_METHOD`. |
| capabilities[] | enum AuthenticationChallengeCapability | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_SUBMIT`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_RESEND`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_AUTOFILL`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_PASSKEY_CONDITIONAL_UI`, `AUTHENTICATION_CHALLENGE_CAPABILITY_SELECT_ANOTHER_METHOD`. |
| custom_capabilities[] | string | No description. |
| password | PasswordChallenge | No description. |
| otp | OtpChallenge | No description. |
| webauthn | WebAuthnChallenge | No description. |
| redirect | RedirectChallenge | No description. |
| approval | ApprovalChallenge | No description. |
| mobile_id | MobileIdChallenge | No description. |
| provider_callback | ProviderCallbackChallenge | No description. |

```json
  "kind": "AuthenticationChallengeKind",
  "display_name": "string",
  "priority": 0,
  "available": true,
  "unavailable_reason": "string",
  "masked_destination": "string",
  "delivery_channel": "AuthenticationDeliveryChannel",

    "AuthenticationChallengeCapability"
  ],
  "custom_capabilities": [
    "string"
  ],
  "hints": {
    "key": "string"
  },
  "recommended": true
}
```

| display_name | string | No description. |
| priority | int32 | No description. |
| available | bool | No description. |
| unavailable_reason | string | No description. |
| masked_destination | string | No description. |
| delivery_channel | enum AuthenticationDeliveryChannel | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_CLIENT`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SMS`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_EMAIL`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_AUTHENTICATOR_APP`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_PUSH`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SIM_PUSH`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_MOBILE_ID`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_WEBAUTHN`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_OIDC`, `AUTHENTICATION_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_SAML`. |

| provider_id | string | No description. |
| provider_error_code | string | No description. |
| details | map<string, string> | No description. |

## AuthenticationAssuranceLevel

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL0 | 1 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL1 | 2 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL2 | 3 | No description. |
| AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL3 | 4 | No description. |

## PhoneNumber

PhoneNumber represents a normalized international phone number.

The value must be stored in E.164 format:

+<country_code><national_number>

Examples:
- +436641234567
- +79991234567
- +12025550123

```json
{
  "e164": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| e164 | string | Phone number in E.164 format. |

```json
      "type": "string",
      "id": "string",
      "transports": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

| --- | --- | --- |
| challenge | string | No description. |
| rp_id | string | No description. |
| timeout_ms | int32 | No description. |
| user_verification | enum UserVerificationRequirement | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `USER_VERIFICATION_REQUIREMENT_UNSPECIFIED`, `USER_VERIFICATION_REQUIREMENT_REQUIRED`, `USER_VERIFICATION_REQUIREMENT_PREFERRED`, `USER_VERIFICATION_REQUIREMENT_DISCOURAGED`. |

| allow_credentials[] | WebAuthnAllowedCredential | No description. |

| step_up_reason | enum StepUpReason | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `STEP_UP_REASON_UNSPECIFIED`, `STEP_UP_REASON_SENSITIVE_OPERATION`, `STEP_UP_REASON_RISK_POLICY`, `STEP_UP_REASON_SESSION_TOO_OLD`, `STEP_UP_REASON_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_TOO_LOW`, `STEP_UP_REASON_USER_REQUESTED`, `STEP_UP_REASON_ADMIN_POLICY`. |
| requested_assurance_level | enum AuthenticationAssuranceLevel | No description.<br/><br/>Available values: `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_UNSPECIFIED`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL0`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL1`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL2`, `AUTHENTICATION_ASSURANCE_LEVEL_AAL3`. |
